title: Rocky Seaside Couple
prompt: Create a serene, romantic outdoor portrait of a couple sitting on a rocky surface by the sea. The colors are soft, warm, and natural, with the sun creating a soft glow on their faces.

title: South Indian Heritage
prompt: A couple in traditional South Indian attire, with the woman wearing a white and gold saree with blue sleeves and adorned with colorful bangles and flower jewelry. The man is dressed in a simple white shirt and a dhoti with a gold border. The couple is engaged in a romantic moment, with the man standing on the ground and the woman stepping down from a stone staircase, holding his hand. title: Beach Sunset Walk
prompt: A couple holding hands and walking on a beach at sunset. The woman is wearing a flowing white dress, and the man is dressed in a white shirt and beige pants. Their hair is gently swaying in the breeze, and the sea is visible in the background. The atmosphere is calm and romantic, with soft lighting and a peaceful, natural vibe.

title: Vibrant Indian Wedding
prompt: Create a beautiful, traditional couple portrait with a vibrant, colorful Indian wedding setting. The woman is wearing a green and purple saree with intricate gold embroidery, accessorized with traditional gold jewelry, including earrings, necklaces, and bangles. prompt: A couple sitting together in a serene, natural forest setting, smiling joyfully.
